scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:compiler
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:runtime && npm run typecheck:compiler
scripts.test:compiler:advanced: cd packages/compiler && node test/test-macros.js && node test/test-jsx-advanced.js
scripts.test:compiler: cd packages/compiler && node test/test-transform.js && node test/test-jsx.js
scripts.test: npm run test:runtime && npm run test:compiler
scripts.test:all: npm run test:runtime && npm run test:runtime:advanced && npm run test:runtime:security && npm run test:compiler && npm run test:compiler:advanced
scripts.deploy: npm run docs:build && npm run build:example
